system.effect: The psyker projects an overwhelming aura of terror into the minds of his enemies. The target must make a Fear (2) test. For every 10 points by which the Focus Power test is passed, the Fear rating increases by 1.

description.value: The psyker reaches into the minds of his enemies and amplifies their deepest fears, projecting a wave of absolute terror. The target must immediately make a Fear (2) test. For every 10 points by which the Focus Power test is passed, the Fear rating increases by 1, to a maximum of Fear (4). Targets that fail their Fear test react according to the standard Shock table.
